description: OCR/vision validation corpus. Every source carries its text ONLY inside images (image files, a scanned PDF with no text-layer, a docx with an embedded image), so parsing requires the AI gateway vision path. The gated e2e tests/e2e/test_validation_ocr_corpus.py skips unless RAG_EVAL_REAL_PROVIDER=1 + a configured provider. Same data-driven shape as manifest.json: add a file + entry to extend. expect_keyword must be reproducible OCR output (kept short and unambiguous).

documents.query: what is the guest wifi network password
where can visitors park their car
what should I do when the fire alarm sounds
what is the facilities hotline phone number
